items.title: [正面] Genuinely the single best gacha game I've ever pla...
items.summary:
Genuinely the single best gacha game I've ever played. The writing is miles above near everything in the Gacha genre, and while the protagonist is a tad bland, as standard for gacha, the overall meaning of the story is clear. The sense of dread is clear and the approach of the end. 

The game is generous, the characters are amazing, the gameplay is extremely fun, and I would even rate it above Mihoyo products in all except the polish that comes with a large scale company backing. 
Will be a long time player and hope the game sticks around for years to come, to fully realize it's potential.

items.title: [负面] CAN'T EVEN GET IT TO RUN.  Hangs while loading ini...
items.summary:
CAN'T EVEN GET IT TO RUN.  Hangs while loading initial data.  Have to force quit and restart to fix.  Then click the "Enter Mythag" button at the bottom, and it hangs on the login.  Have to force quit and restart to fix.  Then have to click "Enter Mythag" a second time to actually enter the game, and it hangs trying to start the game.  Unfortunately, this is NOT fixed with a force quit and restart.  Whenever I used the "Fix" feature, that just simply restarted the whole hanging sequence all over, again.

So, I'm literally UNABLE to play the game.  And it's a shame, because I was really interested in this game for the artwork.  However, if the game is so poorly coded that it is just unable to run, that's not a frustration I'm willing to fight through.

items.title: [Steam新闻] 初めて「忘却前夜」を始めるあなたへ
items.summary: ■忘却前夜の世界についてあなたはミサゴ大学の調査員として、そして、その中でも特別な「守秘者」として、融蝕に対抗するべく、調査を行うことになります。守秘者にはさまざまな役割が求められます。融蝕による事件の調査、解決。融蝕によって忘れられてしまった事象の記録。それぞれの事件の解決は個人では難しく、それは守秘者であっても例外ではありません。事件の解決を助けるため、「覚醒体」と呼ばれる強力な戦力が守秘者とリンクしています。「覚醒体」は一度死んだ後にシルバーコアから覚醒するか、実験改造を受けるか、あるいは偶然の産物によって誕生します。完全な人格と「生前」の記憶を持ち、特殊な能力を持っていることが特徴です。不安定な覚醒体たちと共に守秘者として、事件の解決を目指してください。事件の原因の中心は「融蝕」ですが、その周りにはミサゴ大学と敵対する多くの組織があります。あらゆる困難と理不尽を超えて、覚醒体と共に忘れられた世界を取り戻しましょう。銀の鍵の導きがあらんことを——■忘却前夜のシステムについて忘却前夜では、ステージの「探索」を行い、敵との「カードバトル」を行って、メインストーリーを進行します。初めに...

items.title: Super fun + unique concept
items.summary: I originally downloaded it because I thought the concept of a cosmic horror themed gacha was interesting thinking I’d just uninstall if I got bored. The story is genuinely good AND the gameplay is super fun. There isn’t a stamina system for the main story so you can play all you want (ended up pulling an all nighter by accident.) The combat for non-chaos awakeners can be a little confusing at first but once you get the hang of it, it’s addicting. Right now I’m loving ultra realm awakeners. Wanda and Arachne are great for beating random mobs in 1 turn.

items.title: Love the game, big issue
items.summary: I cannot log into my account using Google Sign-In. Clicking my profile icon immediately triggers the error: "Third-party service login failed. Please check third-party service information." Because the login screen only permits manual typing for official Qookka Accounts, I cannot even attempt to manually enter my Google credentials to bypass the glitch. I have restarted my device, reinstalled the app, and cleared my caches, but the game's authentication handshake remains entirely broken. One star until the login system is fixed. Also, a small suggestion let people manually put in their account credentials to further avoid errors like this.

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Morimens is a gacha with gameplay mechan
items.summary: Morimens is a gacha with gameplay mechanics similar to Slay the Spire, but unlike others that have simply copied StS one-to-one, this game takes those mechanics and expands on them beautifully. The developers are still new, but they have been prompt with bug fixes, accept suggestions from across the community, and have steadily improved the game over time. There have been missteps, but it's a well-crafted game with great artwork and a mature Lovecraftian setting.

items.summary: 沙耶の唄コラボからプレイを始めました。沙耶の唄コラボシナリオは原作を尊重しつつ忘却前夜の世界観に非常に上手く馴染ませています。また沙耶は川村みどりさんが演じ主題歌はいとうかなこさんが歌いシナリオにはニトロオリジンが監修に入っているという本気度なので是非この機会にプレイしてほしい。ゲームの方はルールの理解に少し時間が掛かりましたがカードゲームの様な戦闘は奥深く面白いです。お得な課金パックの誘惑が多い点は良くも悪くも課金に抵抗のない人にとってはリーズナブルに課金が出来るのでいいと思います。ストーリークリアでの課金パック等の購入期限はもう少し長くするか購入権利の復活等があれば初めは訳も分からず課金を見送った人でも後になって欲しくなった人が買ってくれる気がします。沙耶の唄コラボの沙耶と沙耶用の装備のPUは８月中旬まであるので今から始めても間に合いますが、沙耶の唄コラボのミッション(沙耶１体無料で貰える)やお得な課金パックはPUよりも開催期間が短いので始めるなら今すぐがいいですよ(6月25 日に終了)
items.author: 御手洗
